SEARCH

Uses of Package
org.maxicp.search.blackbox

Packages that use org.maxicp.search.blackbox
Package
Description
org.maxicp.search.blackbox
 
  • Classes in org.maxicp.search.blackbox used by org.maxicp.search.blackbox
    Class
    Description
    BlackBoxSearch
    Phase-based black-box search orchestrator for modeling-level CP problems.
    BlackBoxSearch.ExhaustivePhaseOptions
    Configuration for exhaustive DFS/FDS phase.
    BlackBoxSearch.FragmentSelectionStrategy
    Strategy used to choose which decision variables are frozen in each LNS restart.
    BlackBoxSearch.LnsPhaseOptions
    Configuration for LNS improvement phase.
    BlackBoxSearch.RestartPhaseOptions
    Configuration for restart-based feasibility phase.
    BlackBoxSearch.Verbosity
    Logging granularity for phase execution.
    FragmentSelector
    Selects which decision-variable indices are frozen for one LNS restart.
    FragmentSelector.FragmentSelectionContext
     
    FragmentSelector.FragmentSelectionFeedback
     
    ModelingBlackBox.OptimizeConfig
    Configuration object used by optimization solves.
    ModelingBlackBox.Result
    Final outcome returned by ModelingBlackBox.solve(org.maxicp.ModelDispatcher, org.maxicp.modeling.algebra.integer.IntExpression[], int) and ModelingBlackBox.optimize(org.maxicp.ModelDispatcher, org.maxicp.modeling.algebra.integer.IntExpression[], org.maxicp.modeling.symbolic.Objective, int).
    ModelingBlackBox.SolveConfig
    Configuration object used by feasibility solves.
    RunnableSearch
     
    SearchStatus
